prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stands at a playful blog testing bench. Around her are sample heading blocks, an image placeholder, a summary marker, and category/tag chips. She checks that everything renders correctly.

Core meaning: the first custom post tests blog features and layout behavior.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, small blue UI highlights. Minimal labels: "功能测试", "标题", "图片", "摘要".

Avoid cluttered dashboard, avoid giant title text.
